creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ok, now that the vigra website is reachable again it should work.

I found one more incompletness (building of fourier.so) and files build 
for python were not deinstalled. Therefore a new patch is attached, 
which I tested against 8.2 and CURRENT on Tinderbox (amd64).

Please also take notice of my comment from Tue, 17 Jan 2012, thanks.
